explanations.1: This changes the local working directory (where files will be saved on your computer) to c:\temp.
explanations.3: This opens an FTP connection using credentials embedded in the URL—the username, password, and server address are all in that single line.
explanations.7: This sets the file transfer mode to ASCII, which means text files will have line endings converted for compatibility with the destination system.
explanations.9: The -filemask:*.php means 'only download files ending in .php', and the * at the end means 'from all directories'.
